title: Scientific Task Architecture — Phase 0+1: Role Map Audit + Structured Task Schema
intent: Establish the foundational layer for structured task packages by first removing architectural ambiguity (Phase 0) and then introducing the dual-file task schema (Phase 1). This unblocks all subsequent phases of the Scientific Task Architecture initiative.

concepts.name: Canonical role map (Boss/PM, SM, WM, Workers)

bridge_problem: The codebase has inconsistent role descriptions, stale Watchdog references, and no machine-readable task format beyond flat KV files. This prevents structured dispatch, hypothesis tracking, and scientific evidence flow.

hypotheses.text: Role map inconsistencies exist across docs, agents, and scripts
Watchdog references remain in active code paths beyond hooks
Current .task format can be extended with TASK_SCHEMA_VERSION without breaking existing parsers
JSON task files can be created alongside .task files with no disruption to existing task listing/routing

constraints: Backward compatibility: existing .task files must keep working
Bash 3.2 compatibility for all shell changes
No prompt/agent changes until role map is stable (Phase 0 before Phase 1)
No left/right border characters in any new rendering
Legacy task listing must not break when .json files are present
success_criteria: One consistent pane map across all docs, agents, and scripts
Boss and Project Manager are clearly unified in wording everywhere
All Watchdog references classified and handled (remove/migrate/deprecate)
Structured tasks can be created via shell helpers producing both .task and .json
.json is optional — legacy tasks render in simple mode
go build passes if TUI is touched, bash -n passes for all .sh changes
evidence_plan: Grep all files for Watchdog/watchdog references and classify each
Grep all files for pane map descriptions and verify consistency
Create a sample structured task and verify legacy task listing still works
Verify task helpers produce valid .task and .json
deliverables: Updated docs/agents/scripts with consistent role map
Watchdog deprecation audit with classification of each reference
Extended .task format with TASK_SCHEMA_VERSION, TASK_OWNER, TASK_PRIORITY, TASK_SUMMARY
New or updated shell/doey-task-helpers.sh with JSON creation support
Sample structured task demonstrating the dual-file format

phase_plan.scope: Audit role map, normalize pane descriptions, classify Watchdog refs, update docs/agents/scripts
Implement dual-file task schema, update task helpers, create JSON support, verify backward compat
